programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Two virginal teenagers lust after a goth girl whos obsessed with Freddy Krueger

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A young orphan named Theodores adopted by the odd and well-off Colberts with a dark secret Theyre not the only ones

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Nick Knight goes to investigate the alleged suicide of a space scientist he discovers that an asteroid is heading for Earth and is projected to strike within 3 months

programme.title: Hogans 315
programme.desc: Hogans 315

programme.title: Hogans 228
programme.desc: Hogans 228

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton finds out that Parker is an old friend of a famous War Correspondent he makes Parker the Base PR Officer in the hope of becoming the subject of the Correspondents next story But Parkers plan to improve The Captains image backfires

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys concoct a very tall story to try to turn Tinker into a hero so that he can win the heart of his favorite girl But the rumor of Tinkers Secret mission soon spreads throughout the South Pacific and trouble develops when glory-hungry Binghamton tries to get in on the action

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mr Howell names the other castaways as beneficiaries in his will But he then fears they may be trying to kill him for their inheritance when in reality they are throwing a surprise party for him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Envious Grandpa attempts to sabotage a camping trip arranged by Hank Johnson a generous neighbor who has become increasingly popular with Little Luke and his friends

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E36
programme.desc: Tired of being goaded about his lack of competitive spirit Luke becomes determined to beat Grandpa in the countys annual skeet shooting tournament

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While Max and 99 host a writer who is doing a story on CONTROL for a national news magazine his assistant is a KAOS agent intent on making them look like fools

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A man who only wants quiet in the world invents a silent explosive

programme.title: BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of DC Liam recovers the probe but he Augur and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens are forced to move their unborn infants to a refrigeration facility to save them Meanwhile Suzannes ex-husband an investigative journalist appears seeking to uncover the truth about the Blackwood project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane experiments with artificial earthquakes

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressa is taken hostage by a man with a score to settle with Arcane

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble wants to expose a defect in the bloodline of a kennel owners dog but the son and daughter-in-law threaten to stop him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath helps an old friend Ward and his wife Nora after Ward becomes crippled in an accident partly Heaths fault Tensions arise when Ward tries to guilt Heath into giving him 5000 for a timber investment

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old man whos feeling down because he had to sell his shop and has nothing to do sees a young man the grandson of his friend get into a fight with someone with the young man killing the other man with his gun The young man runs away leaving the gun behind The old man picks it up and when some people show up after hearing the shots they assume that the old man killed him Mike is called in and he knows the man and Mike doesnt believe he killed him but arrests him The young man was delivering something for a bookie and the one with the gun was trying to steal it He tries to explain to the bookie what happened but the bookie doesnt believe him because there is something more important than money in the box He then goes to see the old man and tells him that unless he gets the box back the bookie will do stuff to him Mike lets the old man out and follows him to find out whats going on

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain search for a seismologist that MAD has kidnapped for their evil blackmail plot

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 turns evil when hes tricked into changing into a fake power suit but Cy-Kills plot backfires when hes deposed by the newly nasty Guardian

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades and the Guardians compete to be the recipients of an ancient aliens vast store of knowledge Show Challenge of The GoBots

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss has developed a new vine a madness vine which drives men crazy and he is luring the greatest Armada of the Tengu to fight him Jayce tries to warn Prince Akeer not to fight but they are insulted by the thought of defeat or not accepting

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During Glorias first Indy 500 race all electronic devices suddenly come to a stop thanks to a powerful EMP device VENOM is projecting from a blimp Their next target the International Safe Corporation

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Golden Antlers of Artemis said to be able to lead the owner to gold are stolen from a monetary in Greece MASK lays a trap for VENOM to get the antlers back

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland
